name: Slow Cooker Ham and Cheese Supper
recipeInstructions:
Serves 6
Combine ground ham, crushed crackers, egg and barbecue sauce and shape into 6 patties.
In a skillet, sauté potato and onion slices in butter and oil over medium heat, turning frequently to prevent browning. Drain and place in Crock-Pot.
Combine milk, cheese and seasonings and pour over potatoes and onions. Layer ham patties on top.
Cover and cook on Low for 3 to 5 hours.
